faqs.question: How do I book an appointment at Ujala Cygnus Hospital?
faqs.answer: Use the appointment button or call 9508655680. The team will help you choose a convenient consultation time.

faqs.question: What services does Ujala Cygnus Hospital offer?
faqs.answer: Ujala Cygnus Hospital supports patients with Emergency Care, General Medicine, Specialist Consultation, Health Checkups.

faqs.question: Can I ask questions before visiting?
faqs.answer: Yes. You can call, email, or use WhatsApp to ask about availability, services, and the best next step for your needs.

faqs.question: Where is the clinic located?
faqs.answer: Ujala Cygnus Hospital is located at New Delhi, Delhi, India.

aboutText: Ujala Cygnus Hospital brings together experienced healthcare professionals, modern facilities, and patient-first care.
